sys_script_client.description:
2.5 P3 STRY0080141 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) My Documents Tab and Shared DocumentsTab on the Task Form. STRY0080143 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Top Task Owner OR Assigned Member selects a UI to Enable OR Disable Shared Documents on the entire task tree. STRY0080193 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Documents - Disable Sharing UI - Warning Confirmation message Tasker Scrum Team. STRY0080195 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Task User uploading documents to the My Documents tab. STRY0080196 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Task User uploads DocInt documents to the Shared Documents tab. STRY0086644 - DocInt Mapping Error on "New Template" and "New Template Task" in Tasker 2.5.301
when the form loads on the client, check the SNAttachmentsON flag and show or hide the "Attachments" related list.
sys_script_client.name: TempTask - onLoad - Hide Attachment rel
